settings.heading: Understanding Product Weight:
settings.text: The listed weight reflects the farm-provided measurement. After Halal processing and trimming, the final usable portion is about 80-85%, with 15-20% as trimmings, which we pack separately. We prioritize quality and transparency in every cut.

settings.heading: Delivery Information
settings.text:
Game-changing convenience

We offer express delivery within 2 hours across Muscat, all days of the week, 9am-11pm. We’ll pick up and reuse our boxes, and the rest of our packaging is recyclable.

Sustainable and responsible packaging is an integral part of our company strategy; we use suppliers including MULTIVAC, one of the leading providers worldwide of packaging solutions for food.

 *All orders are delivered within 2 hours across Muscat 9am-11pm daily, orders confirmed after 11pm are delivered 9am next day.

Is there a delivery minimum?

No minimum order value and our standard delivery fee is OMR 0.890bz.

When do you deliver?

Express 2 hours delivery, all days of the week, of all fresh meat products across Muscat.

Grills and accessories delivery?

All grills and accessories orders are fulfilled by our partner Casabella Oman in 24 to 48 hours. They work all days of the week except Friday.  

Do I need to tip my delivery driver?

There’s no need to tip your delivery driver — we are committed to paying a living wage that doesn’t depend on tips.

 Where do you deliver?

MLS products are currently available in Muscat.

settings.heading: 100% free replacements & returns
settings.text:
• Drop a Whatsapp message or send us an email within 24 hours after delivery.
  • We will exchange the product and deliver it again to your door, or you can pick it up if you want.
  • You will receive the product or a refund. Refunds will be processed within 14 working days.

settings.heading: MLS Rub
settings.text:
INGREDIENTS:Onion, Garlic, Salt, Black pepper, Corriander, Sugar, Mustard, Parsley, Cumin, Rosemary, Thyme.

No artificial additives. Non-irradiated

settings.text:

No artificial additives. Non-irradiated

settings.heading: Cajun Rub
settings.text:
INGREDIENTS:Salt, Sugar, Smoked paprika (15%), Mustard (12%), Chilli, Garlic, Onion, Cumin, Black pepper, Oregano (4%), Thyme (3%), Parsley.

No artificial additives. Non-irradiated

settings.heading: Peri-Peri Rub
settings.text:
INGREDIENTS:Salt, Sugar, Smoked paprika (15%), Mustard (12%), Chilli, Garlic, Onion, Cumin, Black pepper, Oregano (4%), Thyme (3%), Parsley.

No artificial additives. Non-irradiated

settings.custom_liquid:
<script>
  window.addEventListener('load', function() {
  var _learnq = window._learnq || [];
  function addedToCart() {
   fetch(`${window.location.origin}/cart.js`)
   .then(res => res.clone().json().then(data => {
    var cart = {
      total_price: data.total_price/100,
      $value: data.total_price/100,
      total_discount: data.total_discount,
      original_total_price: data.original_total_price/100,
      items: data.items
    }
    if (item !== 'undefined') {
      cart = Object.assign(cart, item)
    }
    if (klAjax) {
       _learnq.push(['track', 'Added to Cart', cart]);
       klAjax = false;
      }
   }))
  };
  (function (ns, fetch) {
    ns.fetch = function() {
      const response = fetch.apply(this, arguments);
      response.then(res => {
        if (`${window.location.origin}/cart/add.js`
          .includes(res.url) && res.url !== '') {
              addedToCart()
        }
      });
      return response
     }
  }(window, window.fetch));
  var klAjax = true;
  var atcButtons = document.querySelectorAll("form[action*='/cart/add'] button[type='submit']");
  for (var i = 0; i < atcButtons.length; i++) { 
    atcButtons[i].addEventListener("click", function() {
      if (klAjax) {
        _learnq.push(['track', 'Added to Cart', item]);
        klAjax = false;
      }
    })
  }
  });
</script>
